_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: cells were grown for 48hr with 10 nM estradiol (E2) in a Sartorius IncuCyte, and cell doublings were measured via confluence over time
details: Successfully measured cell doublings via confluence over time for proliferation analysis over 48hr with 10 nM estradiol
